name: html-drop-plugin
description: WebStorm plugin — right-click any HTML file to share on HTML Drop

scripts.install: brew install openjdk@21 gradle gh terminal-notifier || true && gh auth login && gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.8 && npm run install:finder
scripts.icon:finder: mkdir -p finder/HTMLDrop.workflow/Contents/Resources && mkdir -p /tmp/html-drop.iconset && sips -z 16 16 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_16x16.png && sips -z 32 32 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_16x16@2x.png && sips -z 32 32 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_32x32.png && sips -z 64 64 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_32x32@2x.png && sips -z 128 128 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_128x128.png && sips -z 256 256 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_128x128@2x.png && sips -z 256 256 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_256x256.png && sips -z 512 512 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_256x256@2x.png && sips -z 512 512 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_512x512.png && sips -z 1024 1024 src/main/resources/icons/icon.png --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_512x512@2x.png && iconutil -c icns /tmp/html-drop.iconset -o finder/HTMLDrop.workflow/Contents/Resources/icon.icns && rm -rf /tmp/html-drop.iconset
scripts.build:finder: npm run icon:finder && cp -r $(brew --prefix terminal-notifier)/terminal-notifier.app finder/HTMLDrop.workflow/Contents/Resources/terminal-notifier.app && cd finder && swift build -c release && cp .build/release/html-drop HTMLDrop.workflow/Contents/MacOS/html-drop
scripts.package:finder: mkdir -p build/distributions && cd finder && zip -r ../build/distributions/HTMLDrop.workflow.zip HTMLDrop.workflow --exclude '*/.gitkeep' --exclude '*/.DS_Store'
scripts.package:all: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && mkdir -p build/release && cp build/distributions/html-drop-plugin-*.zip build/release/ && cp -r finder/HTMLDrop.workflow build/release/ && cp INSTALL.md build/release/README.md && (cd build/release && zip -r ../html-drop-v$VERSION.zip . --exclude '*/.DS_Store') && rm -rf build/release
scripts.release: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && sed -i '' "s/version = \"[^\"]*\"/version = \"$VERSION\"/" build.gradle.kts && rm -rf build/distributions && npm run build && npm run build:finder && npm run package:finder && npm run package:all && gh release create v$VERSION build/html-drop-v$VERSION.zip --title "HTML Drop v$VERSION" --generate-notes
